---
title: "Établi Doc"
sidebar: en
---

<img src="../_icons/icon-doc.svg" alt="" width="80" align="right" style="margin:0 0 1rem 1rem;">

<span class="etabli-badge">Self-hosted client</span>

> Your Paperless-ngx documents, on the go.

Établi Doc is a native iOS and Android client for a self-hosted Paperless-ngx instance. Browse, search, and work with tags, correspondents and document types — straight against your own server. No central service, no intermediary, no telemetry.

![Doc — login screen: server URL and API token are stored only in the platform secure store.](../_screens/0.1.0/01-login.png){width=320}

## Who benefits

Anyone self-hosting Paperless-ngx who wants to access documents not only at their desk but also on the move — e.g. quickly showing an archived PDF in a meeting or looking up an invoice.

## Platforms

| Platform | Status |
|----------|--------|
| iOS      | ✓      |
| Android  | ✓      |

## Privacy

No analytics, no third-party SDKs. Sign-in happens on your own self-hosted Paperless-ngx server. Credentials (URL + API token) live only in the platform secure store (iOS Keychain · Android EncryptedSharedPreferences) and only go to the configured instance.

## Installation

Établi Doc is **under active development**. There are no App Store, Google Play or F-Droid releases yet.

| Channel | Status |
|---------|--------|
| Android (APK) | **Development build** via [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/etabli-dev/etabli-doc/releases) |
| App Store (iOS) | planned — not yet available |
| Google Play | planned — not yet available |
| F-Droid | planned — not yet available |

Details: see [Getting Started](getting-started.qmd).

## Support

If you find the app useful: [Liberapay](https://liberapay.com/rabanheller/) · inside the app you will also find a Buy-Me-a-Coffee link.
